title: MLG Booster
description: Simple GUI allows you to levitate up at different levels!
body:
# MLG Booster Mod

The MLG Booster mod adds a simple GUI that lets you fly with different levels of levitation effects.

## Features:

- **Customizable Options:** Choose how high and fast you want to go with just a few clicks.
- **Simplicity:** Just uses the **Levetation** effect to levitate you up
- **Easy2Use:** Press 'M' in game and set effect time and level then hit escape to exit the GUI and it will *launch* you automatically.

Take to the skies and enjoy a new way to explore your world with the MLG Booster mod!

## Credits:
- I used the [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/) to make this mod.
- Thanks to OpenAI's [Dall-E 3](https://openai.com/index/dall-e-3/) which I used to create the icon.
